title: Vietnamese Creamy Rice Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Vietnamese-inspired wrap filled with creamy rice and fresh vegetables. This recipe is perfect for a quick and satisfying lunch.

ingredients.name: Vietnamese Wrap
ingredients.notes: or substitute with a large flour tortilla

instructions: Cook the white rice according to package instructions.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, soy sauce (if using), and a pinch of salt. Mix well until smooth.
Add the cooked white rice to the bowl and mix until the rice is well coated with the cream cheese mixture.
Stir in the sliced cucumber, grated carrot, and chopped cilantro.
Warm the Vietnamese wrap according to package instructions.
Spoon the creamy rice mixture onto the center of the wrap, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
